alpha.$description: A shared alpha scale for BOTH surface-on-surface elevation stacking (§5 of docs/design-research/design-system-proposal.md) and interaction-state overlays (hover/press) — one set of values instead of a bespoke opacity per component or elevation level. Values reuse Material 2's dark-theme overlay-opacity-by-elevation curve (non-linear, ~4/6/8/11/14%) as a validated reference rather than invented numbers. Works directly with the `opacity` property (accepts a <percentage>) and with color-mix()'s percentage weight argument.
